nodes.label: MIDI Input
nodes.description: Incoming HiseEvent stream (note-on, note-off, CC, aftertouch, pitch wheel)

nodes.label: Gesture Type Filter
nodes.description: Filters MIDI events based on selected gesture type: Press=aftertouch, Slide=CC74, Glide=pitchWheel, Stroke=noteOn velocity, Lift=noteOff velocity

nodes.label: GestureCC
nodes.description: Selects which MPE gesture type to respond to (Press/Slide/Glide/Stroke/Lift)

nodes.label: Normalize to 0-1
nodes.description: Normalizes raw MIDI value to 0.0-1.0 float range. Glide centers at 0.5.

nodes.label: Monophonic Max-Value
nodes.description: In monophonic mode: stores per-channel values and returns maximum across all channels (Press/Slide) or most-deviated from center (Glide)

nodes.label: Monophonic
nodes.description: Enables monophonic mode with shared state and max-value aggregation

nodes.label: Table Lookup
nodes.description: 512-point interpolated lookup table maps normalized gesture value through user-defined curve. Always active.

nodes.label: Set Voice Target
nodes.description: Sets the smoothing target on the matching voice state (channel-matched in poly mode, shared in mono mode)

nodes.label: One-Pole Smoother
nodes.description: Per-sample one-pole smoothing toward target value. Runs per-voice at control rate.

nodes.label: SmoothingTime
nodes.description: Controls the smoothing time constant in milliseconds (0-2000ms)

nodes.label: DefaultValue
nodes.description: Initial value when voice starts and no gesture data is available. Mode-dependent scaling.

nodes.label: Intensity Scaling
nodes.description: Base class applyTimeModulation() multiplies internal buffer by modulator intensity

nodes.label: SmoothedIntensity
nodes.description: Modulation depth/amplitude. Sets the modulator intensity. Mode-dependent display scaling.

nodes.label: Modulation Output
nodes.description: Per-voice modulation signal applied to the voice buffer

nodes.label: MPE Global Enable
nodes.description: Global MPE mode state from MPEData. Controls bypass: modulator is bypassed when MPE is disabled or modulator is not connected.

nodes.label: Retrigger
nodes.description: In monophonic mode, restarts the smoother from start value on new note

nodes.label: Voice Start
nodes.description: Initializes voice state with default value, captures MIDI channel for routing. Stroke uses table-mapped velocity.

nodes.label: Voice Stop
nodes.description: Sets isPressed=false, stops receiving gesture updates. isRingingOff if target is zero.
